title: Cobblemon And More!
description: Standard Cobblemon Modpack with some added mods to boost playing experience
body:
This Modpack started off as the basic Cobblemon modpack that you download, then with some further Cobblemon Fan Mods such as Cobbreeding, Cobblemon: Ride On! and more, and also some personal favourites of mine.

Warning! Distant Horizons is in the modpack and is suggested to make changes to it before loading your world if it is being run on a lower end PC.

For a full run down on the mods in the pack, check out the Content Tab.

 

 

FYI. This Modpack Is intended to be for me and my friends however feel free to use it.
